### Selected Publications

1. **E. Morales-Cuadrado**, C. Llanes, Y. Wardi and S. Coogan, "Newton-Raphson Flow for Aggressive Quadrotor Tracking Control." [*2024 American Control Conference (ACC)*](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.11197)
2. L. Baird, **E. Morales-Cuadrado**, and S. Coogan, "Runtime Assurance for Uncertain Systems from Interval Signal Temporal Logic." Submitted to IFAC Nonlinear Analysis: Hybrid Systems (NAHS), 2025. *(under revision)* [*preprint available.*](https://scholar.google.com/citations?view_op=view_citation&hl=en&user=huppvv8AAAAJ&citation_for_view=huppvv8AAAAJ:Tyk-4Ss8FVUC)
3. **E. Morales-Cuadrado**, L. Baird, Y. Wardi and S. Coogan, "Lightweight Tracking Control for Computationally Constrained Aerial Systems with the Newton-Raphson Method." Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Control Systems Technology, 2026. *(under revision)* [*arXiv preprint available.*](https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.14185)
4. **E. Morales-Cuadrado**, L. Chung, S. Kousik and S. Coogan, ": Fast, Safe Trajectory Planning for Systems under Unknown Disturbances." Joint Submission to 2026 MECC-ALDSC. *(under revision)*
